audio_identity.overall_style: 16-bit arranged remixes of original NES Mega Man scores
distinctive_elements: 16-bit Genesis arrangement of classic Mega Man themes
New compositions for Wily Tower mode
Preservation of original melodic content with enhanced sound quality

notes: Documentation provides composer and general audio approach (arranged 16-bit versions) but does not specify individual track tempos, keys, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics. TCRF source blocked from access per anti-AI disclosure policy.
